report_name: Qilin Ransomware Targets US Telco Q Link Wireless in Double Extortion Attack

threat_actors.name: Qilin
threat_actors.description: A prolific ransomware group that claimed responsibility for a cyberattack against Q Link Wireless. The group operates a Ransomware-as-a-Service (RaaS) model, recruiting affiliates to carry out attacks, and is known for targeting critical infrastructure sectors.
threat_actors.goals: Financial extortion through double extortion tactics, involving data encryption and the threat of public data leakage.

attack_patterns.name: Phishing
attack_patterns.description: Used as a potential initial access vector by Qilin affiliates to steal credentials or deliver malware.

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: Used as a potential initial access vector by Qilin affiliates, exploiting vulnerabilities in internet-facing systems like VPNs or web servers.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration to Cloud Storage
attack_patterns.description: Qilin affiliates exfiltrate large quantities of sensitive data to cloud storage services before deploying ransomware to use as leverage in double extortion.

attack_patterns.name: Data Encrypted for Impact
attack_patterns.description: The Qilin ransomware payload encrypts files across the victim's network, appending a custom extension and dropping ransom notes.

attack_patterns.name: Inhibit System Recovery
attack_patterns.description: Qilin ransomware activity may involve deleting volume shadow copies using 'vssadmin delete shadows' to prevent system recovery.

attack_patterns.name: Service Stop
attack_patterns.description: On VMware ESXi hosts, Qilin may terminate running virtual machines using commands like 'esxcli vm process kill' before encryption.

malware.name: Qilin Ransomware
malware.description: A multi-platform ransomware written in Go and Rust, capable of targeting Windows, Linux, and VMware ESXi environments. It is used in double extortion attacks.

tools.name: vssadmin
tools.description: Used by ransomware like Qilin to delete volume shadow copies to inhibit system recovery.

identities.name: Q Link Wireless
identities.description: A U.S.-based telecommunications provider targeted by the Qilin ransomware group in a double extortion attack.

infrastructure.name: Qilin Dark Web Leak Site
infrastructure.description: The official dark web victim portal where the Qilin group lists its victims and threatens to leak stolen data as part of its double extortion strategy.

indicators.name: Qilin Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
indicators.pattern:
title: Qilin Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
id: 9c7b5e8a-1f3c-4d6e-8b9a-0c1d2e3f4a5b
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of vssadmin.exe to delete volume shadow copies, a common TTP for ransomware like Qilin.
references:
  - https://www.rescana.com/post/qilin-ransomware-attack-analysis-technical-assessment-of-q-link-wireless-incident-and-sector-specific-mitigation-strateg
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-22
tags:
  - attack.t1490
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '\vssadmin.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'delete'
      - 'shadows'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the command used to delete volume shadow copies, a technique associated with Qilin ransomware to inhibit system recovery.

indicators.name: Qilin Ransomware ESXi VM Termination
indicators.pattern:
title: Qilin Ransomware ESXi VM Termination
id: a8d6f4c2-3b1e-4a9f-9c8d-7e6f5a4b3c2d
status: experimental
description: Detects commands used on VMware ESXi hosts to terminate running virtual machines before encryption, a TTP associated with Qilin ransomware.
references:
  - https://www.rescana.com/post/qilin-ransomware-attack-analysis-technical-assessment-of-q-link-wireless-incident-and-sector-specific-mitigation-strateg
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-22
tags:
  - attack.t1489
  - attack.impact
level: high
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: linux
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: '/esxcli'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'vm'
      - 'process'
      - 'kill'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the use of 'esxcli' to kill virtual machine processes on VMware ESXi hosts, a precursor to encryption by ransomware like Qilin.

indicators.name: Potential Data Exfiltration to Public Cloud Storage
indicators.pattern:
title: Potential Data Exfiltration to Public Cloud Storage
id: b3e1a0d9-5c8f-4b7e-9a6d-4f3c2b1a0d9e
status: experimental
description: Monitors for anomalous, large data uploads to common cloud storage providers, which can indicate data exfiltration prior to a ransomware attack like Qilin's.
references:
  - https://www.rescana.com/post/qilin-ransomware-attack-analysis-technical-assessment-of-q-link-wireless-incident-and-sector-specific-mitigation-strateg
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-22
tags:
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.exfiltration
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-host|contains:
      - 'mega.nz'
      - 'dropbox.com'
    cs-method: 'POST'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects large outbound data transfers to public cloud storage services like Mega or Dropbox, which is a common technique for data exfiltration used by groups like Qilin.

relationships.source_name: Qilin Ransomware Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
Potential Data Exfiltration to Public Cloud Storage
